steps: Levelup (Click somewhere on the map that is not changing colour - this is used to see if the screen changes colour (you level up) and will then click off it automatically). It is probably best to click on the very right of the monkey selection as it does not change colour.
Win check (after winning click somewhere on the white part of the next button (this is used to check when you have won))
Restart (press escape twice to first remove the freeplay dialogue and then pause it - Then click the restart button)
Restart confirmation (Click the restart confirmation button)
Ok now intentionally of your own will lose all your lives and click the white of the restart sign
info: For the duration of calibration ensure your game is on you primary monitor (you can move the window after)
To move the btd6 window you can press Windows + Shift + Left or right arrow keys
